scenario.context: Station 05 of the day flow: Understand market environment, value creation and economic relationships.
scenario.mission: You classify market and process relationships and derive impacts for the company.

station.profile: Market environment, competition, value creation, economic cycle
constraints: link market context with operational context

customerRequest.subject: Station 05: Market environment and processes
customerRequest.body: Please assess market situations and their impact on value creation, order volume and prioritization in the company.

questions.title: Analyze the market environment
questions.prompt: Which factors directly influence the market environment of an IT service provider? (Multiple selection)

options.rationale: Direct impact on the service offering.

options.text: Random team mood without process relevance
Technological changes in the target market

feedback.correct: Correct: these are central market influence factors.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: please separate market and operational factors more clearly.

questions.title: Understand value creation
questions.prompt: Which statement best describes value creation in a service business?

options.text: Combine service steps so that a usable benefit is created for the customer
options.rationale: This describes the core of value creation.

options.text: Collect only internal activities without customer relevance
options.rationale: Without customer benefit there is no sustainable value creation.

options.text: Consider only the final price without process view
options.rationale: Price alone does not explain how value is created.

feedback.correct: Correct: value creation is customer-benefit oriented.
feedback.wrong: Not appropriate: value creation needs process and customer benefit context.

questions.title: From market impulse to service
questions.prompt: Order the sequence from market impulse to service delivery.

feedback.correct: Correct: this shows a market-oriented process chain.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: start with market impulse, then internal implementation, then feedback.

questions.title: Calculate demand development
questions.prompt: A service rises from 80 to 98 requests per month. By what percentage does demand increase (rounded)?

feedback.wrong: Please relate the increase correctly to the initial value.

questions.title: Market context for training
questions.prompt: In 4-6 sentences, explain how a market change can affect daily training work in IT service.
questions.expectedOutline: Market change, operational impact, concrete adjustment in training daily work.

feedback.correct: Correct: market and operational context are clearly linked.
feedback.wrong: Please connect market change, impact and adjustment more concretely.
